groups.instruction: Answer the questions based on the audio.
groups.prompt_html:
MULTIPLE CHOICE 06

Questions 11 - 16

For each question, choose two correct answers, A - E.

Write them in any order in answer boxes.

Which TWO facts about Sydney Harbour Bridge are true?

11

12

AIt is 134 metres long.
BIts height changes according to the weather.
CThe pylons that support each end of the bridge are made of concrete and granite.
DAll the materials used to construct the bridge came from Australia.
EA large number of workers came from other countries to work on the bridge.

Which TWO things does the man think are unfair?

13

14

AA single team of workers constructed the bridge.
BPeople who had lived in the area before the bridge was built lost their houses.
CThe government didn't give any money to people who had to move house.
DThe construction worker earned very low wages.
EMany workers on the bridge were injured.

Which TWO statements about Sydney Harbour Bridge are true?

15

16

AThe opening ceremony took place in 1932.
BIt is the longest bridge of its type in the world.
CIn the 1930s people admired the engineering of the bridge.
DMany popular songs are still sung about the bridge.
EPostage stamps showing the bridge are still used in Australia.

items.prompt_html: | A | The opening ceremony took place in 1932. |

options.label: A
options.text: The opening ceremony took place in 1932.

options.label: B
options.text: It is the longest bridge of its type in the world.

options.label: C
options.text: In the 1930s people admired the engineering of the bridge.

options.label: D
options.text: Many popular songs are still sung about the bridge.

options.label: E
options.text: Postage stamps showing the bridge are still used in Australia.
